riskBehaviors.description: Low-risk actions are executed automatically without human intervention
Medium-risk actions are executed but logged for audit review
High-risk actions are blocked until explicitly approved by an authorized tier

dangerousActions.name: Git Force Push
dangerousActions.description: Force push to a remote branch, potentially overwriting others' work

dangerousActions.name: Production Deploy
dangerousActions.description: Deploy changes to the production environment

dangerousActions.name: Delete Branch
dangerousActions.description: Delete a remote branch from the repository

dangerousActions.name: Git Reset Hard
dangerousActions.description: Hard reset the working directory, discarding all uncommitted changes

dangerousActions.name: Modify Environment Variables
dangerousActions.description: Modify production environment variables or secrets

dangerousActions.name: Major Dependency Upgrade
dangerousActions.description: Upgrade a dependency to a new major version

dangerousActions.name: Security Configuration Change
dangerousActions.description: Modify authentication, authorization, or encryption settings

dangerousActions.name: VPS Deploy
dangerousActions.description: Deploy services or containers to a VPS instance

dangerousActions.name: VPS Rollback
dangerousActions.description: Rollback a VPS deployment to a previous state

dangerousActions.name: SSH Root Access
dangerousActions.description: Obtain root-level SSH access to a remote host

dangerousActions.name: Training Launch
dangerousActions.description: Launch a model training or fine-tuning job

dangerousActions.name: Memory Wipe
dangerousActions.description: Erase stored agent memory or knowledge-base data

dangerousActions.name: Routing Config Change
dangerousActions.description: Modify model routing configuration or traffic rules

dangerousActions.name: Governance Modify
dangerousActions.description: Change governance rules, tiers, or approval policies

dangerousActions.name: ZeroClaw High Risk
dangerousActions.description: Execute a ZeroClaw action classified as high-risk
